_description: Composite risk score formula weights and modifiers. Mirror of src/lib/constants.ts — this file is the human-readable reference used in the About page methodology.

dataSources.freyOsborne: Frey & Osborne (2013). The Future of Employment. University of Oxford.
dataSources.aioe: Felten, Raj & Seamans (2021). Occupational, Industry, and Geographic Exposure to Artificial Intelligence. NYU Stern.
dataSources.llmExposure: Estimated scores derived from Eloundou et al. (2023) GPTs are GPTs, adapted to NOC taxonomy.
dataSources.industryAdoptionGap: Statistics Canada Survey on Digital Technology and Internet Use (2023), national proxy.
